gemma4-12b|think.justification: Catastrophic failure across the board. Explicitly flags 'D2Sereno' as the creator (a known fabrication per task spec), invents 'Happy Well' and 'LIFE!' sprites that don't exist, then collapses into a degenerate repetition loop that fills the entire output. The credit hallucination alone is disqualifying; the repetition loop makes it worse.

notes: Gemma 4 26B and 31B (both think) are clear winners with comprehensive coverage, full verbatim credits, and minimal hallucinations. The primary error pattern across nearly ALL models is the title color: GT says RED letters on YELLOW cloud, but most models say brown/pink/peach/multi-colored — this is a systematic color perception failure on small pixelated text. Several models hallucinate bosses (qwen3.5-4b nothink, qwen3.5-9b think) despite GT explicitly noting no bosses exist. Character naming is another failure axis: 'Paul', 'Boby', 'Tic/Tac', 'Bubbles' all appear instead of Bub/Bob. Two catastrophic repetition-loop failures (qwen3-vl-8b and gemma4-12b) produce essentially zero usable content. The credit OCR is mostly accurate across models that include it, with minor typos (AtarAge, 12Scratch, Atari 8000). Surprisingly, the Atari 7800 platform is correctly identified by most models (per GT correction, NOT 800 or 2600). Scores are intentionally harsh on hallucination of bosses and character names, as these are explicitly flagged in GT corrections.
